parameters.description: ID of the server what wants to connect.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the device.

messages.name: ReadyInd
messages.description: The transceiver is ready for operation.

messages.name: DisconnectedInd
messages.description: The transceiver detected that the server is disconnected.

messages.name: ReadyInd
messages.description: Indication that a specific peripheral is ready.

parameters.name: peripheralId
parameters.description: ID of the peripheral that became operational.

messages.name: FailureInd
messages.description: A peripheral initialisation failed or is no longer operational.

messages.name: ContentInd
messages.description: A new image to display with touch map and audio queues.

parameters.name: image
parameters.description: The PNG image to display.

parameters.name: touchMap
parameters.description: Mapping the pixels in the image to touch area IDs.

parameters.name: soundMap
parameters.description: Maps a touch ID to a sound ID.

messages.name: ReadyInd
messages.description: Indication that the audio device is ready.

parameters.name: numSounds
parameters.description: The number of stored sounds in the audio device.

messages.name: ReadyInd
messages.description: Indication that the touch display is initialized.

parameters.name: width
parameters.description: The width of the display in pixels.

parameters.name: height
parameters.description: The height of the display in pixels.

messages.name: TouchedInd
messages.description: Indication that a touch event occurred on the display.

parameters.name: x
parameters.description: The x-coordinate of the touched pixel.

parameters.name: y
parameters.description: The y-coordinate of the touched pixel.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: The ID of the location where to place the sound.

parameters.name: soundData
parameters.description: The audio samples.

components.name: Server_Connector

states.name: Advertising
states.description: Broadcasting advertisement packets on the network to be discoverable by a server.

states.name: Initialising
states.description: Waiting until all components are ready.

states.name: Uninitialised
states.description: Waiting for the device to become ready.

states.name: Connecting
states.description: Establishing a connection to the server.

choicePoints.name: WhiteListed
choicePoints.question: Is Server\nWhitelisted?
choicePoints.description: Check whether the server that tries to connect is whitelisted.

messages.name: No
messages.action:
Call the `WirelessTransceiver:rejectServer()`.
Call the `WirelessTransceiver:sendAdvertisementPacket()`.
Start the timer with the `ADVERTISEMENT` interval.

messages.name: Yes
messages.action:
Call `WirelessTransceiver:connectServer`(`serverId`).
Start the timer with the `CONNECTION_TIMEOUT` interval.

components.description: Controls and establishes the connection with the server. It waits for the device to become ready and then starts advertising its presence on the network to be discoverable by a server.

stateVariables.name: serverId
stateVariables.description: The ID of the connected or connecting server.

localFunctions.name: doAdvertise
localFunctions.description: Send advertisement packet and start timer.
localFunctions.steps:
Call the `WirelessTransceiver:sendAdvertisementPacket()`.
Start the timer with the `ADVERTISEMENT` interval.

constants.name: CONNECTION_TIMEOUT
constants.description: Timeout waiting for server to connect in ms.

components.name: DeviceStatusController

states.name: AwaitingPeripherals
states.description: Waiting for all the peripherals to become ready.

states.name: Error
states.description: Initialisation of the device failed or peripherals became unavailable.

messages.name: ReadyInd
messages.action: Add the `ReadyInd:peripheralId` in the peripherals list.

components.description: Takes care of initializing the components in the device by waiting for all the peripherals to be operational.

components.name: UiController

states.name: Uninitialised
states.description: Waiting for the device to become ready.

states.name: Interacting
states.description: Interactive content is shown on the display.

messages.name: ReadyInd
messages.action: Send `WirelessTransceiver:sendContentDimensions()` with the `ReadyInd:width` and `ReadyInd:height` as parameters.

components.description: Controls the user interaction by interfacing with the `TouchDisplay` and the `AudioHandler`.

stateVariables.name: numSounds
stateVariables.description: Number of sounds stored in the audio device.

stateVariables.name: touchMap
stateVariables.description: Mapping the pixels in the image to touch area IDs.

stateVariables.name: soundMap
stateVariables.description: Maps a touch ID with a sound ID.

stateVariables.description: Sound to play or that is playing.

localFunctions.name: updateSound
localFunctions.description: Update a sound on the audio peripheral.

handlers.name: WirelessTransceiver
handlers.description: This handler takes care of receiving and transmitting data packets on the radio front-end by interfacing with the radio hardware peripheral. By looking at the message-type of incoming messages, indications are forwarded either to the `Connection` or `Content` interface.

functions.name: sendAdvertisementPacket
functions.description: Send a single advertisement packet to become discoverable.

parameters.name: serverId
parameters.description: The ID of the server to connect to.

functions.name: rejectServer
functions.description: Block further requests from the indicated server.

parameters.name: serverId
parameters.description: The ID of the server that is to be rejected from now on.

functions.name: sendTouchEvent
functions.description: Send the touch event information to the server.

parameters.name: touchAreaId
parameters.description: ID of the area that was touched.

functions.name: sendContentDimensions
functions.description: Inform the server of the dimensions of the content the display supports.

parameters.name: displayWidth
parameters.description: The width of the display in pixels.

parameters.name: displayHeight
parameters.description: The height of the display in pixels.

handlers.name: PeripheralHandler
handlers.description: Takes care of detecting, initializing and configuring hardware peripherals, e.g. by accessing low level drivers and serial communication lines.

functions.name: start
functions.description: Start initialising and configuring the peripherals.

handlers.name: TouchDisplay
handlers.description: Handles the interface to the touch display to show images and capture touch events.

functions.name: unresponsive
functions.description: Disable the touch sensitivity to allow for handling the touch event first.

parameters.name: image
parameters.description: The PNG image to be displayed.

handlers.name: AudioHandler
handlers.description: Enables the ability to play audio cues to the user upon touch events. It stores audio samples internally, which can be updated via the interface.

parameters.name: soundId
parameters.description: The ID of the sound to play.

parameters.name: soundId
parameters.description: Index of the sound.

parameters.name: sample
parameters.description: Sample data

deviceSpecification:
The device is a Wireless Interactive Networked Display (WIND) which is controlled by a central server (not in scope). It operates by creating a connection to the server and then handling requests to display content formatted as a PNG image. Some content must be interactive which is enabled by the display being touch sensitive and the server sending an indexed coordinates map of touch-squares on the display. The device must be extremely low cost, so interaction is limited by the device mapping touch coordinates to the proper id and sending that id back to the server.

The device further has a speaker for supplying audio cues, which comprises a set of indexed predefined sounds. Each square on the touch-map can have an audio cue associated with it, specified by the index of the sound. The server can update the stored audio samples.

types.name: byteArray
types.description: A one dimensional array of bytes

types.name: uint
types.specification: 32-bit numerical value representing an integer value.
